description: Cause-chain parity: wrapping an inner exception via the runtime's ExecutionError must preserve the inner exception object so downstream code can recover it through the language's native unwrap idiom (Go errors.As / Java Throwable.getCause() / Python __cause__ / C++ pine::error_as<T>).
notes: FAIL:<reason> output indicates the language has lost the cause-chain capability (regressed parity).
This fixture is consumed by scripts/cross-validate/15-error-cause-chain.sh which spawns the four probe binaries and asserts byte-identical stdout.
